userGroups.dailyValueTargetGroupName: Adults and children 4 or more years of age
userGroups.langualCodeDescription: Adults and Children 4 years and above

statements.notes:
HELPS REGULATE SLEEP CYCLE
• Chewable
• Fast Absorption*
A Dietary Supplement
SUGGESTED USAGE: As a dietary supplement, take one lozenge just prior to bedtime as needed. Chew lozenge or hold in mouth until dissolved.
Melatonin is a hormone produced in the pineal gland of mammals that is involved in the regulation of sleep/wake cycles.*
*This statement has not been evaluated by the FDA. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure or prevent any disease.
Caution: If you are under medical supervision seek the advice of your physician or health care professional prior to use.

statements.type: Precautions re: Pregnant or Nursing or Prescription Medications
statements.notes:
Individuals with auto-immune conditions, depressive disorders, those taking sedatives or corticosteroid drugs, or pregnant or lactating women, should consult their physician prior
to use.
This product may cause drowsiness. Do not operate a vehicle or heavy machinery following consumption of melatonin.
Keep out of reach of children.
ACTUAL SIZE
This product has been formulated in a lozenge form to ensure the fastest and most complete absorption of Melatonin into the bloodstream.

NOW(R) Melatonin is synthesized according to the highest pharmaceutical standards
of quality and purity. NOW(R)’s Melatonin is not animal derived.
Do Not Eat Freshness Packet. Keep in Bottle.
Store in a cool, dry place.
Please Recycle.
Made in the U.S.A.
Vegetarian Formula
GMP QUALITY ASSURED
Contains no salt, starch, yeast, wheat, gluten, soy, milk, egg or preservatives.
Vegetarian Formula.
CODE 3258 V1
